## Summary

Describe the change and the operational problem it addresses.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Repository or release infrastructure

## Validation

Describe the checks performed, including browser, userscript manager and MissionChief domain where relevant.

- [ ] Existing behaviour remains intact.
- [ ] User data and settings are preserved or migration is documented.
- [ ] No duplicate panels, listeners, observers or timers were introduced.
- [ ] Safety-sensitive actions have clear scope and cancellation behaviour.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog were updated where required.
- [ ] Private data, tokens and development-only diagnostics were removed.

## Screenshots or evidence

Add screenshots, console output or test evidence where useful. Remove private information first.

## Attribution

Confirm that authorship and project roles are represented accurately.
